meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Ship SaaS Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your build. Learn advanced debugging with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to overcome development friction and ship your MVP today.
content.answer_block: To finish your SaaS, move from manual debugging to AI-orchestrated resolution. Use Claude Code to audit your codebase for architectural debt and Antigravity to simulate edge cases. By automating the 'fix-verify' loop, you eliminate the cognitive load that causes project stalls, ensuring you ship functional code consistently.
content.intro:
You have the vision, the architecture, and the drive, yet your project sits in a graveyard of 'almost finished' repositories. The friction isn't your capability; it’s the mental tax of debugging complex state management and elusive edge cases that drain your momentum. You aren't failing to build; you are failing to manage the entropy of your own code.

True velocity comes from offloading the grunt work to LLMs that don't get tired. By integrating AI into your CLI, you transform the debugging process from a bottleneck into a competitive advantage. It is time to treat your codebase like a high-performance machine and your AI tools like a senior engineering squad.

steps.title: Automated Architectural Audit
steps.description: Identify hidden bottlenecks and technical debt preventing feature completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project architecture for high-cyclomatic complexity areas that block feature shipping. Suggest refactoring to simplify state management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Audit the src directory for technical debt and list the top 3 blockers to deployment.'

steps.title: Isolating Ghost Bugs
steps.description: Use AI to trace intermittent failures that stall development progress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reproduction script for the intermittent crash in the user authentication flow. Isolate the race condition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Debug the authentication race condition by analyzing logs in /var/logs/app.log.'

steps.title: Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Lock in your progress by generating high-coverage tests for critical paths.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for the payment gateway integration to ensure no regressions occur during deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Generate Jest unit tests for all functions in the /services/payment directory.'

steps.title: Dependency Conflict Resolution
steps.description: Clean up your node_modules or environment to ensure a stable build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit package.json for conflicting dependencies and suggest versions that align with the current production environment requirements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Identify and resolve version conflicts in package-lock.json.'

steps.title: Final Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Perform a final sweep of the codebase for deployment-ready best practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the build script for performance optimizations and security vulnerabilities before the production release.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Run a security scan and suggest final performance tweaks for the build pipeline.'

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'Definition of Done' file to ensure it doesn't over-engineer solutions.
Use Claude Code in a screen-recording session to document your logic while debugging for future maintenance.
Treat your Antigravity prompts as 'Engineering Requirements'—the more specific the constraints, the cleaner the code.
Run your AI debugging sessions during your 'low-energy' hours to reserve your peak cognitive time for business strategy.
Regularly purge your conversation context in Claude Code to prevent 'AI drift' where the model loses track of your core architecture.
content.next_steps: Once your codebase is stable, deploy your MVP to a staging environment and run a smoke test to ensure your AI-assisted fixes hold up under load.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting unfinished projects define your potential. Leverage the power of automated debugging to reclaim your time and finish what you started. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
